snippet.title: The life of the super-rich in Central Africa | DW Documentary
snippet.description:
Many millionaires live in the Democratic Republic of Congo, one of the world's poorest countries. This film depicts some of those who have made fortunes amid the chaos, including musicians, mining bosses, entrepreneurs and preachers.

The DRC is rich in raw materials, but only a few profit from its natural resources. While 60% of Congo's inhabitants live on less than $1.25 per day, businessmen, artists, former rebel leaders and evangelists are reaping the rewards of economic growth. In the capital, Kinshasa, these new rich live in safe and luxurious enclaves, while children toil in coltan mines in the eastern part of the country.
Fally Ipupa has made his money with music. Others rely on their business acumen, like Patricia Nzolantima, who founded a taxi company and aims to give more opportunities to women.
With 3,000 mine workers, Cooperamma is the largest employer in North Kivu, in the east of the DRC. Managing director Robert Seninga says his coltan mines are extremely well-run, yet safety standards are poor. Coltan, a globally coveted mineral, is used in cell phones and other devices. It‚Äôs both a blessing and a curse for the Congo. It makes some rich, but for others it means death. The region still suffers from ethnic and factional conflicts, with money from illegal coltan smuggling financing new violence. It‚Äôs a vicious cycle.

ŔÄŔÄŔÄŔÄŔÄ

I‚Äôll never be more loved than I am right now
Wasn‚Äôt holding You up so there‚Äôs nothing I can do to let You down
Doesn‚Äôt take a trophy to make You proud
I‚Äôll never be more loved than I am right now

Going through a storm but I won‚Äôt go down
I hear Your voice carried in the rhythm of the wind to call me out
You would cross an ocean so I wouldn‚Äôt drown
You‚Äôve never been closer than You are right now

Jireh You are enough
Jireh You are enough
I will be content in every circumstance
Jireh You are enough

Don‚Äôt wanna forget how I feel right now
On the mountaintop I can see so clear what it‚Äôs all about
Stay by my side when the sun goes down
Don‚Äôt wanna forget how I feel right now

I‚Äôm already loved
I‚Äôm already chosen
I know who I am
I know what You‚Äôve spoken
I‚Äôm already loved
More than I could imagine
And that is enough

That is enough
You are enough
So I am enough

If He dresses the lilies with beauty and splendor
How much more will He clothe you
How much more will He clothe you
If He watches over every sparrow
How much more does He love you
How much more does He love you

More than you ask, think or imagine
According to His power working in us
It‚Äôs more than enough

Written by Steven Furtick, Chandler Moore, Naomi Raine and Chris Brown

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Arsenal vs Liverpool (0-3) | Premier League
snippet.description:
We slumped to a second consecutive defeat at the Emirates, and in truth can have few complaints about the result.

Champions Liverpool put us under pressure for most of the 90 minutes, while up front it was a frustrating evening for our forwards, who had very little to work with all game.

We held the visitors at bay for the first half, but once Diogo Jota was brought on, Liverpool moved up a gear and ran out comfortable winners.

It was a scrappy opening 15 minutes from both sides, before Liverpool slowly began to force us deeper and deeper into our own territory.

In fact we were struggling to get out of our own half at times, and the visitors really should have taken the lead when Trent Alexander-Arnold cut the ball back to the unmarked James Milner, but his first-time effort was off target.

The first-half stats did not look pretty for us. We managed just one shot compared to Liverpool's six, while the visitors enjoyed twice as much possession as us in the opening 45 minutes. To make matters worse we lost Kieran Tierney to injury just before the break.

Tierney's replacement, Cedric, had our first effort on target of the match, forcing a diving save from Alisson after being set up by Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang.

But the general flow of play remained towards our own goal, and Liverpool eventually took the lead through substitute Jota. His powerful header was too hot for Bernd Leno to handle after meeting Trent Alexander-Arnold's cross.

Five minutes later Mohamed Salah doubled the lead when he threaded the ball through Leno's legs at the near post.

We were architects of our own downfall for the third goal. Gabriel gave the ball away when playing out from the back, Liverpool worked it back into our box for Jota to gratefully tuck home his second.

The result leaves us stranded in ninth place, as attention once again turns to the Europa League this midweek.

#arsenal #premierleague #liverpool

Enjoy match highlights, training and behind the scenes to get closer to the likes of Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang, David Luiz, Vivianne Miedema, Nicolas Pepe, Alexandre Lacazette, Leah Williamson, Bernd Leno, Danielle van de Donk, Willian, Hector Bellerin, Jordan Nobbs, Bukayo Saka, Kim Little, Gabriel Martinelli, Thomas Partey and more.

Subscribe to the Official Arsenal YouTube Channel: https://arsn.al/youtube
Follow us on Facebook: https://arsn.al/facebook
Follow us on Twitter: https://arsn.al/twitter
Follow us on Instagram: https://arsn.al/instagram
Follow us on TikTok: https://arsn.al/tiktok

This is the Official YouTube channel for Arsenal Football Club.

For more match action, highlights and training videos, make sure you become a digital member and sign up to Arsenal Player. It's FREE and is the Home of the Game: https://arsn.al/arsenalplayer

Arsenal Football Club were formed in 1886 and amassed 13 League titles, 14 FA Cups. Some of their greatest players include: Thierry Henry, Dennis Bergkamp, Tony Adams, Ian Wright, Robert Pires, Liam Brady, Patrick Vieira, Cliff Bastin and Charlie George.

snippet.title: Lindiwe You Killed Tumi ‚Äď The River | 1 Magic
snippet.description:

snippet.title: ‚ÄúThy Will Be Done‚Äú- Saint Israella Bushiri's Burial Ceremony
snippet.description:
Dont forget to subscribe to get the latest Videos from Prophet Shepherd Bushiri by clicking this link:https://bit.ly/3h2BRFq

‚ÄúMy wife and I are broken but not destroyed. The badness of the devil cannot change the goodness of God. 
It is the wish of every parent to be buried by their children, not the other way around. 
However, when God was calling me, he taught me to bow to his sovereign will. 
I have taught my wife that, I have taught my kids that, and I preach that. 

Are we the first people to go through this? Am I the first person? No. 
You have all gone through this. And be strengthened and be encouraged. What you went through is what we are going through. 

But we all have faith and hope that Jesus Christ is the same yesterday, the same today and the same forever. 
What is remaining for us, with Israella, is not for her to come where we are, but when God, at his own sovereign time comes, we will both go where she is. 
With all our hearts, we have accepted the call of God over our daughter Israella.‚ÄĚ

snippet.title: Uzalo S7 -  Eps 15
snippet.description:
Mr Mbatha gets the shock of his life. Nosipho cracks the whip with the salon ladies. An oblivious Nkunzi is planning a surprise for MaNgcobo.

Download the free VIU app from your Android Play Store or Apple iStore today. Catch the new season S6 of Uzalo  at 20:30 ( Mon-Fri) on SABC 1, and here on YouTube at 21:00.

UZALO tells the story of two family dynasties and the two young men who carry their hopes and legacies as they face the complexities of money, family and love. At the heart of this series, a question is asked: In a country with a history as complex and multifaceted as South Africa√ēs, what are the ties that bind? Is it blood-ties that make up the family unit, or the bonds forged with perfect stranger who often become dearer to us? Catch Uzalo‚Äôs free catch-up service in South Africa only on Mzansi‚Äôs brand new video streaming service VIU.

snippet.title: BMW M4 v AMG C63 v Audi RS5 - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow‚Äč and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

How‚Äôs this for an all-new epic drag race! 

We‚Äôve got Mat in the all-new BMW M4, and he‚Äôs lining up alongside the Mercedes-AMG C63 S & Audi RS5!

So how do they match up? First up we've got the M4, and under the bonnet you‚Äôll find a 3-litre straight-six which can deliver 510hp & 660Nm of torque. 

As for the AMG, well it‚Äôs not too different. It may have a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 instead, but it can also deliver 510hp, coupled with 700Nm. Finally we have the RS5, which has a 2.9-litre V6 which can put down 450hp and 600Nm of torque. 

Think the Audi is the underdog? Well it has one key benefit - Quattro AWD! As for both the BMW and AMG? Well, they've only got RWD! Will that make the difference? You‚Äôll have to keep watching to find out!

Check out our German YouTube channel - https://www.youtube.com/carwow-Deutschland

How‚Äôs this for an all-new epic drag race! 

We‚Äôve got Mat in the all-new BMW M4, and he‚Äôs lining up alongside the Mercedes-AMG C63 S & Audi RS5!

So how do they match up? First up we've got the M4, and under the bonnet you‚Äôll find a 3-litre straight-six which can deliver 510hp & 660Nm of torque. 

As for the AMG, well it‚Äôs not too different. It may have a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 instead, but it can also deliver 510hp, coupled with 700Nm. Finally we have the RS5, which has a 2.9-litre V6 which can put down 450hp and 600Nm of torque. 

Think the Audi is the underdog? Well it has one key benefit - Quattro AWD! As for both the BMW and AMG? Well, they've only got RWD! Will that make the difference? You‚Äôll have to keep watching to find out!

snippet.description:
MaNgcobo gets the ball rolling on the heist. MaMkhize uses force to disperse Church Members. MaMlambo is cyberbullied.

Download the free VIU app from your Android Play Store or Apple iStore today. Catch the new season S6 of Uzalo  at 20:30 ( Mon-Fri) on SABC 1, and here on YouTube at 21:00.

UZALO tells the story of two family dynasties and the two young men who carry their hopes and legacies as they face the complexities of money, family and love. At the heart of this series, a question is asked: In a country with a history as complex and multifaceted as South Africa√ēs, what are the ties that bind? Is it blood-ties that make up the family unit, or the bonds forged with perfect stranger who often become dearer to us? snippet.description:

Volg my:

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/bernicewest_/

Lirieke:

O kind, is daar iets wat jy wil s√™? 
Ek hoor die wolke praat weer stories oor al jou kleure 
bou jy weer huisies by die bure 
gooi jy klippies teen die mure
Skop vas, tel jou kop op as jy praat 

O kind, ek het opgemors, maar ek kla nie 
Trap jy spore van jou eie
moenie huiwer om te vra nie 
Want dis nie geld wat jou siel gaan red nie 
Ook nie geld wat geluk gaan koop nie 
As jy jou hart laat klop stop die dinge wat jou pla
Trek los, luister hardop na goeie raad 

O kind, o kind 
Sal jy jou laaste asem spaar
Dat ek my raad aan jou kan openbaar 
Hou jou naaste aan jou sy 
Luister na wysheid wat jy kry 
Geniet die nou 
Laat jou hart op God vertrou 

O kind, stof jou rakke af
moenie kla nie 
Gooi jou beddings nat met die trane wat jy versamel 
Gooi jou drome in ‚Äėn tas
en trek die skoen aan wat jou pas
vertrek op die ritme van jou hart
Trek los, luister hardop na goeie raad 

O kind, o kind 
Sal jy jou laaste asem spaar
Dat ek my raad aan jou kan openbaar 
Hou jou naaste aan jou sy 
Luister na wysheid wat jy kry 
Geniet die nou 
Laat jou hart op God vertrou 

O kind, na na na 
O kind, na na na
O kind, O kind sal jy jou laaste asem spaar

O kind, daar‚Äôs genade jy hoef nie te vrees nie 
Pas jou hart net op
Gun jouself genot  
moenie kneus nie 
Kyk uit, want ek hou jou fyn dop 

#BerniceWest #NetGeleen #OKind

snippet.title: Intaba Yase Dubai - Sbali (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Sometimes all you can do is admire from a distance all that you love wholeheartedly, knowing that being close, will be hard yet attainable. That is what Intaba Yase Dubai tells us in is his Zulu debut single titled #Sbali

Song: Sbali
Artist: Intaba Yase Dubai
Written by: Intaba Yase Dubai and Kgosi Mahumapelo
Composer: Bafana Makudulela, Kgosi Mahumapelo, Siyabonga Mkhize and Cwenga Mbele
Music Publisher: Ambitiouz Group PTY LTD

Lyrics: 
Uma ngingakuxoxela indab‚Äôongayazi
Ngicela ungathwali izandl‚Äôekhanda
Ngicel‚Äôungamangali.
Mina ngingakuxoxela indab‚Äôongayazi
Engakuthwalisa izandla ekhanda 
Ngicel‚Äôungamangali.
Sengahlale ngiphethe isthombe sakho ephaketheni 
Ngoba ngihlale nginethemba ukuthi ngizokubona
Sengahlale ngphethe isthombe sakho 
Ephaketheni phela inhliziyo iyagxumagxuma mangikbona.
Uyajabula umphefumulo, kimi ufana nesbuko 
Engath‚Äôungahlala useduze nami
Uz‚Äôungkhonzele kubafwenu 
Uz‚Äôubaxoxele ngeliny‚Äôilanga ngizoba wu sbali
Ngifuna ukuba wu sbali
Lentombi kumele kube ngeyami
Ngifuna ukuba wu sbali
Lentombi kumele kube ngeyami.


(Verse 1)
Mina uma ngivuka we dali
Ngicabanga wena ekhanda lami
Ngiyazi uyazibuza ke manje
Ukuthi why ngingakuqondi ngikutshele lendaba
Hay ukuthi ngiyakusaba 
Indlela engikuhlonipha ngayo
Angifuni uthi nginamanga lento into eyenzakalayo 
Ukube nginamandla bengizovele ngiyifake emaphepheni 
Uvele udume umhlaba wonke njengosheleni
Ngihlanyiswa isithombe sakho 
Lesi engisiphethe ephaketheni lami
Isona esingenza ngbone impilo esangihlalele emhlabeni
Mina anginalutho esandleni 
Ngizokupha okusenhlizweni yami ungunaphakade  
Bahlale bengibuza abangani
Bethi why ngingasiloyi lesithombe sakho

(Chorus)
Uyajabula umphefumulo, kimi ufana nesbuko 
Engath‚Äôungahlala useduze nami
Uz‚Äôungkhonzele kubafwenu

(Verse 2)
Sengiqala ukulibuka nangamehlo enqondo 
Usuku lwamalobolo 
Obvious ngzobe senginemali eningi 
Nigyow spenda wonke umholo
Usuyongixolisela kwabomndeni 
Mina angizwani neyikoloto 
Mina ngiyabhadala
Sengisho ukuthi noma bengakhalanga   
Uthando lwakho lufana no Amen enhlizweni yami 
Lufika njalo mangithandaza.
Ngiye ngithi mhla ngayeba inhliziyo yakho 
Ngalolosuku kuyogijima iveni
Umjuluko uyobe uzehlela ebusweni 
Kubafwenu mhla ngidla amanzi e-orintshi
Sekumele babize umfana omncane ngo sbali 
Isimo sobe siphoqa ngalesosikhathi kuyobe kuymina oholile
Angibona laba abathi khona abazokwenza 
Khona i chappies uma isiphelile hey mina.

(Chorus)

snippet.title: Suez Canal reopens after giant stranded ship is freed - BBC News
snippet.description:
Traffic has resumed in the Suez Canal after a giant, stranded container ship blocking it for nearly a week was finally freed by salvage crews.

Tug boats honked their horns in celebration as the 400m-long (1,300ft) Ever Given was dislodged on Monday with the help of dredgers and tug boats.

Hundreds of ships are waiting to pass through the canal which links the Mediterranean to the Red Sea via Egypt.

It is one of the world's busiest trade routes.

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

snippet.title: $1,018 Nike "Satan Shoes" by Lil Nas X Unboxing
snippet.description:
The very unique and limited Satan Shoe is a base Nike Air Max 97 by MSCHF and Lil Nas X, with the air bubble containing 60cc ink and one drop of human blood. Each shoe is uniquely numbered between 1/666 and 666/666 and sells for $1,018. In addition, each shoe has the bible verse Luke 10:18, an upside-down cross, and a handmade bronze pentagram with custom engraving. Satan Shoes Instagram - http://instagram.com/mikethecompass

YouTube Playlist: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLWrsZwkJoxJVX8flcAwW0oz_ySRDCoHRv

#LilNas #SatanShoes

snippet.title: Lil Nas X "Montero (Call Me By Your Name)" Official Lyrics & Meaning | Verified
snippet.description:
Lil Nas X‚Äôs ‚ÄúMONTERO (Call Me By Your Name)‚ÄĚ is his latest hit, with the music video racking up over 32 million views since it dropped on Friday. Produced by Roy Lenzo, Omer Fedi, and Take a Daytrip, the song first popped up as an Instagram snippet and later appeared in a Logitech Super Bowl commercial. It is the second single from his upcoming album of the same name, which is expected to drop this summer.

‚ÄúMONTERO (Call Me By Your Name)‚ÄĚ is inspired by a former relationship, with lyrics that reflect the artist‚Äôs journey to accepting his sexuality.

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! ūüĎÄ


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ‚Ėļ https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ‚Ėļhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ‚Ėļhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-¬≠filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

snippet.title: We Moved Across The Country
snippet.description:
You can check out our new live streaming channel here! https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCiiY0MsUgNihfAZ2ZgC19lg

Hello friends and welcome to another video! So, late last year we decided to take the plunge and move across the country for a fresh start in a new place. After doing some serious decluttering, we packed up our house, grabbed our cat, and hit the road (and vlogged our whole cross-country road trip in our minivan!) It's been a couple of months and we are finally set up enough to dive back into making videos, so here is our moving vlog! Hopefully you guys enjoy it, and thank you for being so patient with us while we figure all of this out. 

Also, sorry about any smudginess of the windshield! It was tough to keep clean on our drive, but I know sometimes it can look gross, so sorry about that! Lol

This video is NOT sponsored!!

You can check out my Instagram here! https://www.instagram.com/safiyany/‚Äč

Via AudioNetwork

snippet.title: Giveon - Heartbreak Anniversary (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
"When It's All Said And Done...Take Time" available at: https://Giveon.lnk.to/WhenItsAllSaidAndDone_TakeTime
"Heartbreak Anniversary" Official Audio: https://youtu.be/nja_0BaQcNg

Follow Giveon:
Instagram:  https://www.instagram.com/giveon/?hl=en
Twitter:  https://twitter.com/giveon?lang=en
Facebook:  https://www.facebook.com/Giveonmusic/
Soundcloud:  https://soundcloud.com/giveon

Lyrics:
Ooh

Balloons are deflated
Guess they look lifeless like me
We miss you on your side of the bed, mmm
Still got your things here
And they stare at me like souvenirs
Don't wanna let you out my head

Just like the day that I met you, the day I thought forever
Said that you love me, but that'll last for never
It's cold outside like when you walked out my life
Why you walk out my life?

I get like this every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary
'Cause I remember every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary, do you ever think of me?
(Oh-ooh) No
(Ooh) No, no, no
(Ooh, ooh) Ooh, nah (Ooh)

I'm buildin' my hopes up
Like presents unopened to this day
I still see the messages you read, mmm
I'm foolishly patient (Foolishly patient)
Can't get past the taste of your lips (Taste of your lips)
Don't wanna let you out my head

Just like the day that I met you, the day I thought forever
Said that you love me but that'll last for never
It's cold outside like when you walked out my life
Why you walk out my life? (My life)

I get like this every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary
'Cause I remember every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary, do you ever think of me?
(Oh-ooh) Of me
(Ooh) 'Cause I think of you, think of you
(Ooh, ooh, ooh-ooh)

(C) 2021 Epic Records. With Not So Fast LLC.

#Giveon #HeartbreakAnniversary #WhenItsAllSaidAndDoneTakeTime

snippet.title: President Biden falls on Air Force One stairs
snippet.description:
President Joe Biden has fallen on the stairs of Air Force One while boarding the aircraft.

Mr Biden, who was on his way to Atlanta, appeared unhurt and carried on unaided.

snippet.title: Glitterbomb Trap Catches Phone Scammer (who gets arrested)
snippet.description:
I glitterbombed my way up the scammer chain of command.  Come join me in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

If you suspect that you or a loved one has been the victim of fraud, you can call or visit the National Elder Fraud hotline (https://stopelderfraud.ovc.ojp.gov/)  at 833-372-8311 and report it to the FTC by visiting the agency‚Äôs website (https://reportfraud.ftc.gov/#/) or calling 877-382-4357.

We‚Äôve got a BMW X6M Competition going up against a Lamborghini Urus (no prizes for guessing who‚Äôs in which car)! These two SUV heavyweights are going head-to-head over the quarter-mile, and when looking at stats alone, you might think it‚Äôll be an easy win for the Urus! 

Under the Lambo‚Äôs bonnet, you‚Äôll find a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 which can deliver 650hp and 850Nm. As for the BMW, it may pack a 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8, but it only puts down 625hp & 750Nm! But that‚Äôs not all‚Ä¶ The Urus is also 200kg lighter than the X6M!

snippet.title: losing control : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
‚ÄúI crossed a line I‚Äôd never crossed in addiction.‚ÄĚ 

In part I of this fearless documentary series, Demi Lovato and her family and friends candidly open up for the first time about what led to her near-fatal overdose.

Resources:
 
The National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA) helpline
1-800-931-2237 (they also offer click-to-chat messaging) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
If you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner

fr.title: La perte de contr√īle : Dancing with the Devil
fr.description:
‚ÄúJ'ai d√©pass√© les limites de ma d√©pendance.‚ÄĚ 

Dans la premi√®re partie de cette courageuse s√©rie documentaire, Demi Lovato, sa famille et ses amis √©voquent en toute franchise pour la premi√®re fois ce qui l'a conduite √† son overdose quasi fatale.

en.title: losing control : Dancing with the Devil
en.description:
‚ÄúI crossed a line I‚Äôd never crossed in addiction.‚ÄĚ 

In part I of this fearless documentary series, Demi Lovato and her family and friends candidly open up for the first time about what led to her near-fatal overdose.

Resources:
 
The National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA) helpline
1-800-931-2237 (they also offer click-to-chat messaging) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
If you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger


Pre-order Demi Lovato‚Äôs new album ‚ÄėDancing With The Devil‚Ä¶ The Art Of Starting Over‚Äô https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

id.title: Kehilangan Kendali : Dancing with the Devil
id.description:
‚ÄúAku melewati batas yang tak pernah aku lewati karena kecanduan.‚ÄĚ

Di bagian I dari serial dokumenter yang tak kenal takut ini, Demi Lovato, bersama keluarga dan teman-temannya, terus terang terbuka untuk pertama kali tentang apa yang menuntunnya pada overdosis yang nyaris mematikan.

Sumber:

Saluran bantuan National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA)
1-800-931-2237 (mereka juga menawarkan perpesanan klik-untuk-obrolan)
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org

Saluran siaga SAMHSA untuk perorangan dan anggota keluarga yang mengalami gangguan kesehatan mental dan/atau penggunaan substansi
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

Jika kau memerlukan dukungan segera, silakan menghubungi saluran teks krisis daerahmu:
AS: Ketik HOME kirim ke 741741
Britania Raya: Ketik SHOUT kirim ke 85258
Kanada: Ketik CONNECT kirim ke 686868 atau 741741

The official YouTube channel of Atlantic Records artist Bruno Mars. 11x GRAMMY Award winner and 27x GRAMMY Award nominee Bruno Mars is a celebrated singer, songwriter, producer, and musician with iconic hits like "The Lazy Song", "That's What I Like", "Just The Way You Are", "24K Magic", "Locked Out Of Heaven", and "When I Was Your Man". His legendary body of work also includes blockbuster albums such as Doo-Wops & Hooligans, Unorthodox Jukebox, and 24K Magic, as well as era-defining collaborations like "Uptown Funk" with Mark Ronson, "Finesse" with Cardi B, and "Nothin' On You" with B.o.B. Forever classic, yet supremely innovative, Bruno continues to redefine music, style, and popular culture, pushing the boundaries of pop, R&B, funk, soul, hip-hop, and dance, and remains as influential as ever.

snippet.title: reclaiming power : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
‚ÄúYou really find out who‚Äôs there for you when the world falls out from under your feet.‚ÄĚ
Demi goes to rehab and begins her road to recovery, but with bumps along the way. As she returns to the stage for the first time since her overdose, she needs to find balance in her life.
Resources:
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
For mental health education and resources go to Hope for the Day at hftd.org 
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger

Listen to Demi Lovato‚Äôs new song, ‚ÄúDancing With The Devil‚ÄĚ: https://demilovato.lnk.to/DWTD/youtubemusic
Pre-order Demi Lovato‚Äôs new album ‚ÄėDancing With The Devil‚Ä¶ The Art Of Starting Over‚Äô https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

id.title: Meraih Kekuatan Kembali : Dancing with the Devil
id.description:
‚ÄúKau akan benar-benar mengetahui siapa yang berada di sisimu ketika kehidupanmu hancur berantakan.‚ÄĚ
Demi menjalani rehabilitasi dan memulai perjalanannya untuk pemulihan, tetapi dengan berbagai rintangan. Di saat dia kembali naik panggung untuk pertama kali sejak dirinya overdosis, dia perlu menemukan keseimbangan di dalam hidupnya.
Sumber:
Saluran siaga SAMHSA untuk perorangan dan anggota keluarga yang mengalami gangguan kesehatan mental dan/atau penggunaan substansi

TTY: 1-800-487-4889

snippet.title: Dax - APOCALYPSE (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Are we near an Apocalypse. Are the end of times really closing in. This second acts a pre secondary installment to my song called Book of Revelations. If you have time go check that out after along with Dear God. I think this topic is important. What are your thoughts on a ZOMBIE APOCALYPSE?  Let me know in the comment section as I love to read and reply to as many as I can. Do you believe God is soon returning? This song is meant to create a discussion. Thank you. Let's share and make an impact. My name is Dax and I am an artist who is currently creating something out of absolutely nothing.
 
Share and help spread the message...

Click here to listen: https://ingroov.es/apocalypse-pc

Follow Dax: thatsdax
Shot By: Logan Meis
Produced by: Lex Nour Beats

#Apocalypse #bookofrevelation #God #dax

LYRICS:

I see violence
Oh
And I hear sirens
Uh oh oh
No where to go
No where to run
They gave me the shot
They took away guns
nothing to eat
We can‚Äôt go to sleep
We‚Äôre stuck in our homes
They‚Äôre flooding the streets
Everyone watching and glued to their screens 
misinformation like every week
APOCALYPSE!

This ain‚Äôt no game better choose your side and protect your soul 
devil is lurking he‚Äôs looking for victims in power to use and regain his control
No one to trust everybody‚Äôs corrupt
End of the world really feels like it‚Äôs close
Feels like it‚Äôs Truman and I‚Äôm just a person they‚Äôre watching at home on a evening show
Fake information and all of it‚Äôs free 
Dumb politicians, Corrupt police
Tanks and riots, bodies piling, smell of 
corruption is flooding the streets
Children are crying there‚Äôs nothing to eat
Left and right there‚Äôs no in between 
Who do we trust when it‚Äôs us against us and we‚Äôll do anything just to get a retweet
2021‚Äôs no joke boy you better stay inside pray to God during these times
Let me you give some advice, at night, stay inside, your life has a price, they will buy
Everybody‚Äôs trying to fight, gas prices spiked, no bus can‚Äôt walk we can‚Äôt drive
Everybody's on edge, trying to get ahead, so I‚Äôm chucking up this peace sign
Let me get into the real
They I don‚Äôt care how you feel
You‚Äôre just animal and you‚Äôre their next meal
There‚Äôs no peace 
I pray to god on my knees
The gates of hell open are we can all feel that heat
I remember when everything changed
When Technology went from an aid to the primary poison of all of our Brains
We‚Äôve been programmed to think that we need it we slave and we worship it everyday 
and in every way we‚Äôre becoming the robot they gave us and losing humanities way

I see violence
Oh
And I hear sirens
Uh oh oh

No where to run
They gave me the shot
They took away guns
nothing to eat

We‚Äôre stuck in our homes
They‚Äôre flooding the streets
Everyone watching and glued to they screens

If you're a soldier stand up ya know
Stay 10 ten toes
look em face 
don‚Äôt you fold

Selling sex, selling children 
Genocides, waters rise, Homicides, missing women, 
rich got richer
what did they do? 
man they cut out small business 
fake statistics, 
flood the streets with drugs and filled up all the prisons 
They‚Äôre shifting the energy 
You can‚Äôt see the enemy
God is returning they don‚Äôt got to say it the climates been telling me
From way the they‚Äôre abusing the teachings and pushing religion like it‚Äôs an accessory
Pick a side it‚Äôs the dark or the light, in the scariest times that we‚Äôve seen in a century

YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtube‚Äč‚Äč

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipa‚Äč #FutureNostalgia‚Äč #Grammys
